name: memory
description: Compiled symbolic memory for agents: append-only log, direct entity state lookups, and fast lexical retrieval without embeddings or vector search.

capabilities.description: Stores and retrieves durable agent memory using a symbolic-first compiled index instead of embeddings. Use when the user wants to remember facts, search prior notes, or inspect the current state of an entity.
triggers: what do we know about Alice
show the state for this entity

memory_entity.description: A normalized entity tracked in the memory state table

add.description: Append a memory entry with optional entity, slots, and tags

remember.description: Update direct entity state and store the supporting evidence entry

state.description: Return the current slot state for an entity

rebuild.description: Rebuild the compiled index from the append-only log

doctor.description: Validate storage paths and report memory stats
